criteria.text: GET /api/tasks returns 200 array of {id,title,owner,due,status} aggregating across all connected users To Do lists
status by practice-zone calendar date: completed->done, due<today->overdue, due==today->due-today, else upcoming; all-day dues not shifted
Microsoft not connected -> 401 not_authenticated (tasks ride Graph session)
owner reflects single connected user (constant); multi-owner tasks-by-owner out of scope here
criteria.defer: single-user scope; multi-owner split to follow-up

criteria.text: tasks read audit-logged at HTTP layer; logs/errors carry ids/paths only, never task titles (PHI-adjacent)
